name: VarSubScope
postCreateCommand: echo -n "${SHOULD_BE_LITERAL_CWF}" > $HOME/container-env-cwf.out && echo -n "${SHOULD_BE_LITERAL_CWFB}" > $HOME/container-env-cwfb.out && echo -n "${SHOULD_BE_LITERAL_CENV}" > $HOME/container-env-cenv.out && echo -n "${SHOULD_RESOLVE_LOCAL}" > $HOME/container-env-local.out && echo -n "${REMOTE_CWF}" > $HOME/remote-env-cwf.out && echo -n "${REMOTE_CWFB}" > $HOME/remote-env-cwfb.out && echo -n "${REMOTE_CENV}" > $HOME/remote-env-cenv.out && echo -n "${REMOTE_LOCAL}" > $HOME/remote-env-local.out
